hero.subheadline: Products that make money. Not slide decks.

problem.title: EVERYONE SELLS AI. NOBODY SHIPS IT.
problem.description: Chatbots hallucinate. Dashboards need interpretation. RAG retrieves the wrong docs. The only metric: does it run in production, 24/7, without a human babysitting it?

capabilities.title: ORACLE
capabilities.description: Temporal prediction intelligence. Binary signals on world events — yes or no, before it happens. For traders who need an edge, not an explanation.

capabilities.title: SHADOW
capabilities.description: Founder timing analysis. Birth chart + company incorporation date = when this person or idea peaks. For VCs who want to know before the pitch.

capabilities.title: OUTBOUND
capabilities.description: Voice AI for B2B sales calls. Real voice, real conversation, real meetings booked. Not a demo — your phone starts ringing.

capabilities.title: VOICE DISPATCH
capabilities.description: Factory repair technician routing. Call comes in, system routes to the right technician, job gets booked. No multi-day waits.

work.title: PREDICTION SIGNALS THAT TRADE
work.description: Entity corpus + news monitoring + astrological timing → 1-bit signals. Yes or no. Published to Discord. Ready to act on.

work.title: FOUNDER TIMING FOR INVESTORS
work.description: When is this founder's next peak? When is this company likely to break out or burn out? Birth chart + incorporation date.

work.title: YOUR SALES TEAM RUNS 24/7
work.description: Voice AI that makes real B2B calls. Handles objection, books the meeting. You stop prospecting and start closing.

process.title: SIMPLE PROCESS.
process.description: No discovery sprints. No design thinking workshops. We build what works and ship it.

steps.title: DISCOVER
steps.description: You tell us the problem and the deadline.

steps.title: BUILD
steps.description: We ship a working version fast.

contact.tagline: BUILT TO RUN. NOT TO PITCH.
